project_summary: This project aims to transition the existing transactional database into a structured Data Warehouse using a Star Schema. By centralizing facts and dimensions, the new system will enable high-performance querying for business analysts, supporting critical requirements like Lifetime Value and Replacement Costs through a robust ETL process.

sprints.sprint_objective: Establish project understanding, define the architectural blueprint, and set up the initial database environment for the Data Warehouse.

mini_sprints.description: Review business requirements, finalize the Star Schema design, and document the architectural approach for the Data Warehouse.
mini_sprints.deliverable: Approved Star Schema design document and architectural blueprint.

mini_sprints.description: Create the dedicated `maven_analytics_dw` database instance to host the new Data Warehouse.

sprints.sprint_objective: Define and implement the schema for the foundational dimension tables, which provide descriptive attributes.

mini_sprints.description: Create the `dim_location` table to consolidate address, city, and country information.
Create the `dim_film` table to store film details, category, and award status.
Create the `dim_customer` table to track customer profiles, including loyalty metadata and a foreign key to `dim_location`.

sprints.sprint_objective: Define and implement the schema for the core fact tables and the independent stakeholder registry.

mini_sprints.description: Create the `fact_inventory` table to support inventory counts and valuation requests.
Create the `fact_transactions` table to support payment averages, maximums, and Lifetime Value (LTV) requests.
Create the `stakeholder_registry` table as a standalone entity for board and investor information.

sprints.sprint_objective: Outline the conceptual ETL logic and load the initial dimension data into the Data Warehouse.

mini_sprints.description: Document the conceptual ETL logic, including flattening, aggregation, and snapshotting strategies for data transformation from source to DWH.
mini_sprints.deliverable: ETL conceptual design document outlining data transformation rules.

mini_sprints.description: Implement and execute the ETL process to populate the `dim_location` table from source data.
Implement and execute the ETL process to populate the `dim_film` table, including the calculation of the 'award_tier'.

sprints.sprint_objective: Load the customer dimension and the primary fact tables, completing the core data population for analytical use.

mini_sprints.description: Implement and execute the ETL process to populate the `dim_customer` table, linking customer profiles with their respective location keys.
Implement and execute the ETL process to populate the `fact_transactions` table, consolidating payment and rental metrics.
Implement and execute the ETL process to populate the `fact_inventory` table, capturing inventory valuation snapshots.

sprints.sprint_objective: Populate the stakeholder registry and perform initial validation of all loaded data to ensure integrity and accuracy.

mini_sprints.description: Implement and execute the ETL process to populate the `stakeholder_registry` table from independent advisor and investor lists.
Perform comprehensive checks for data consistency, completeness, and foreign key relationships across all Data Warehouse tables.
mini_sprints.deliverable: Data validation report confirming data integrity and accuracy.

sprints.sprint_objective: Optimize the Data Warehouse for query performance and prepare it for consumption by business analysts and reporting tools.

mini_sprints.description: Add necessary indexes to fact and dimension tables to ensure optimal query performance for common analytical requests.
mini_sprints.deliverable: DWH tables indexed and performance benchmarks met.

mini_sprints.description: Develop and test a sample executive dashboard query to demonstrate the simplified SQL and performance benefits of the new Data Warehouse.
mini_sprints.deliverable: Functional sample executive dashboard query with documented results.

mini_sprints.description: Finalize all project documentation, including schema definitions, ETL processes, and usage guidelines, for a smooth handover to operations and analytics teams.
mini_sprints.deliverable: Comprehensive project documentation and successful project handover.
